sizing_rule.note: Unit-per-dollar model ($2,500 per contract) with position sizing scaled inversely to individual instrument volatility and stop-loss distance. Maintains equal risk exposure across up to 20 concurrent positions in diversified portfolio.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions using a unit-per-dollar model to maintain equal risk exposure across multiple positions in a diversified portfolio, scaled by individual position volatility and stop-loss distance.
